command:
echo "=== WAIT 10s for CF route to propagate ==="
sleep 10

echo "=== CHECK REMY WEBHOOK STATUS ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
r = urllib.request.urlopen(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/getWebhookInfo', timeout=10)
d = json.loads(r.read())
wh = d.get('result', {})
print('url:', wh.get('url','NONE'))
print('pending_updates:', wh.get('pending_update_count', 0))
print('last_error:', wh.get('last_error_message', 'none'))
print('last_error_date:', wh.get('last_error_date', 'none'))
"

echo "=== TEST WEBHOOK ENDPOINT DIRECTLY ==="
curl -s --max-time 10 -o /dev/null -w "%{http_code}" https://remy.cutegrafiks.com/telegram-webhook || echo "FAILED"

echo "=== SEND TEST TO REMY VIA TELEGRAM API ==="
python3 -c "
import json, urllib.request
tok = '8363191602:AAGVXfJKqNGNhyS-EuxEl8CKRcUyjqIGtPE'
# Send a test message to check if Remy responds
payload = json.dumps({'chat_id': 8869156588, 'text': 'Health check: Remy webhook route fix applied. Testing connectivity.'}).encode()
req = urllib.request.Request(f'https://api.telegram.org/bot{tok}/sendMessage',
    data=payload, method='POST',
    headers={'Content-Type': 'application/json'})
try:
    r = urllib.request.urlopen(req, timeout=10)
    d = json.loads(r.read())
    print('sendMessage:', 'OK' if d.get('ok') else d)
except Exception as e:
    print('sendMessage error:', e)
"
